calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Court Judgment After Default
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Dennis D. Miller, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HARVEST MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY PARTNERS, L.P.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SIDNEY B. DUNMORE, aka SIDNEY DUNMORE, aka SID DUNMORE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice..
David Shapiro sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $652,563.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,799,901.00
Attorney's Fees: $139,004.00
Costs: $4,375.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,799,901.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To May-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
